settings.gg04R6jmeH0_text: Not sure what goes on first? Here’s a quick step-by-step guide inspired by the Korean 10-step routine:
settings.gg3SW6mBpIe_text: Highly concentrated. Acts quickly and intensely on specific skin concerns.
settings.gg4su7-an7R_text: How and when to apply them
settings.gg8hQFUj3nw_text: What role does each play in your skincare routine?
settings.ggA5hgLkFwW_text: How to choose the right product for you
settings.ggBGWKX4pzx_text: How to choose the right product for you
settings.ggCbI5i3VrW_text: Key differences between essence, ampoule, and serum
settings.ggDWYk8HtfY_text: What role does each play in your skincare routine?
settings.ggEUWPVM_pu_text: Now that you know what each product does, let’s talk about why they’re total game-changers in your skincare routine.
settings.ggGJGclMkS2_text:
A facial essence is a lightweight product that gives your skin the hydration boost it needs, leaving it refreshed and plump.

Ampoules are the most concentrated treatments in your routine. Think of them as your skin’s SOS solution for moments when your complexion needs an instant boost, like before a big event, after a sleepless night, or whenever your skin feels dull and stressed.

Facial serums are powerful but lighter than ampoules, making them perfect for daily use. They’re designed to target concerns like dehydration, fine lines, or uneven texture while keeping your skin balanced, hydrated, and glowing long term
settings.ggM5Dj4FsKT_text: Apply a few drops and spread evenly. Focus on problem areas if needed.
settings.ggN29TeDdm5_text: Lightweight, watery, and hydrating. Prepares the skin for what’s next.
settings.ggNH1agqHMg_text: Your serum is the loyal daily partner your skin can count on. Less concentrated than ampoules but still packed with active ingredients, serums work consistently to hydrate, brighten, and keep your complexion glowing day after day.
settings.ggRA4cODjof_text:
Here’s a foolproof tip: always read the ingredients list and pick products suited to your skin type. And of course, if you’re unsure, the Korean Skincare team is always here to help you find the perfect match.
 

So, how about it? Feeling like a skincare pro when it comes to essences, ampoules, and serums? With these powerful products in your routine, your skin is all set to glow bright, stay healthy, and feel well cared for!
settings.ggRtqxKFh4j_text: What are essences, ampoules, and serums?
settings.ggUy_F5lkoQ_text: Think of essence as the opening act before the big show. It delivers an instant dose of hydration and prepares your skin to absorb the rest of your products.
settings.ggYVmiiyRII_text: Go for lightweight, non-comedogenic formulas. Use an ampoule only when your skin needs rebalancing, and stick with a mattifying serum daily.
settings.gg_8GQeQMqs_text: Can you use all three in the same routine?
settings.gg_GQehuLrg_text: Remember: a great skincare routine is all about patience and consistency!
settings.ggcWABWQGo1_text: Apply with your hands, gently patting it into your skin.
settings.gggvF_fSHrM_text: Choose a hydrating essence, a nourishing ampoule for tough days, and a serum with ingredients like hyaluronic acid or ceramides.
settings.ggjcnr3DF10_text: A continuous, daily treatment. More fluid than ampoules, but still powerful.
settings.ggkLkeJJhsB_text: Use every morning and/or evening for long-term skin benefits.
settings.ggoxIGOxvsy_text: What are essences, ampoules, and serums?
settings.ggqxYhS1x6W_text: Can you use all three in the same routine?
settings.ggs_Shk6_J4_text: An essence is a lightweight product that gives your skin the hydration boost it needs, leaving it refreshed and plump
settings.ggsuc8uMOvV_text:
If you’re someone who loves a good skincare routine (and really, who doesn’t love glowing, healthy skin?), then you’ve probably heard of facial essences, ampoules, and serums. But… do you really know the difference between a serum and an ampoule? And can you list all the benefits serums bring to your skin?
 

Don’t worry! In this guide from Korean Skincare, we’ll break it all down so you’ll know exactly when and why to use each product.
settings.ggtf0wnfxYG_text: How and when to apply them
settings.ggwBEkyXq-V_text: Look for soothing essences with ingredients like green tea or aloe. Use a gentle, fragrance-free ampoule, and opt for serums formulated for reactive skin.
settings.ggzgnSHTcnr_text: Yes! Remember, ampoules aren’t designed for everyday use; they’re your special-occasion secret weapon when your skin needs an extra push. Meanwhile, essences and serums can (and should!) be part of your daily ritual to keep your complexion balanced, radiant, and healthy.
